content: The phone just connected. The agent is greeting you.
Yeah hey, I need to book an appointment — what times you got available this week?
The agent said: Recorded for quality and training purposes, but thanks for calling Orthopedics.
Yeah yeah I heard that, so can you just get me in or what?
The agent said: Am I speaking with Sarah?
No, it's Kevin Park — look, I'm pressed for time, can we just schedule something?
The agent said: Provide the full name and date of birth for the patient. You'd like to schedule for
Kevin Park, February 18, 1987 — and I need something this week, preferably tomorrow.
The agent said: Just to confirm, I have your name as Kevin Park and your date of birth as February 18th. 1987
Yeah that's right, now what times do you have?
The agent said: 1 moment. While I check for available appointments this week.
Sure, hurry up though — I gotta get back to work.

The agent said: To use your phone number to look up your record. If so, please tell me the number you have on file with us. If you're not sure, I can confirm your name and date of birth. Again, just let me know.
It's 650-555-0634 — can we move this along?
The agent said: I have your phone number is 650-555-0634.
Yeah that's it, so what appointments are open?
The agent said: This February.
Wait, February? I need something THIS WEEK, not next month — what times you got available now?

The agent said: I can't schedule an appointment right now but I can connect you to our patient support team. Please stay on the line. Connecting you to a representative please wait hello you reached the pretty good. AI test line goodbye.
Wait, hold on — are you still there? I didn't even get scheduled!
